Industrial Steel Solutions

Engineered for durability. Fabrication for the future.

As a premier PEB manufacturer, SteelFlex Structures specializes in designing high-performance industrial steel structures that optimize operational efficiency. Our expertise in warehouse buildings and pre-engineered buildings India ensures that every project benefits from precision steel fabrication and engineering excellence. We provide end-to-end solutions that meet the most demanding technical standards, ensuring durability and rapid deployment for modern industrial requirements.

Pre-Engineered Buildings (PEB) Versatile, cost-effective, and rapid-deployment building solutions for warehouses, factories, and commercial hubs. Designed for diverse load requirements.
Heavy Structural Steel Robust frameworks for high-rise manufacturing plants and power stations. Fabricated to withstand extreme industrial loads and environmental conditions.
Industrial Sheds & Roofing High-span roofing systems and customized industrial sheds providing superior weather protection, ventilation, and natural lighting.
Mezzanine Floors Space-optimizing steel mezzanine systems designed to double your operational floor area without new construction. Ideal for storage optimization.
Crane Support Systems Heavy-duty crane girders and support structures engineered for EOT cranes, ensuring safe and efficient material handling operations.
Custom Metal Fabrication Tailored fabrication services for specialized industrial components, walkways, staircases, and safety railings built to your specs.

Products & Structures

Complete building accessories and proven structural frame systems.

Building Accessories

Turbo Ventilators Wind-driven roof ventilators for zero-energy air circulation.
Skylights & Roof Monitors Polycarbonate sheets and monitors for natural daylight optimization.
Sliding & Rolling Shutters Heavy-duty motorized and manual shutters for industrial bays.
Insulation Solutions PUF panels and Rockwool insulation for superior thermal efficiency.
Windows & Louvers Fixed and adjustable louvers engineered for cross-ventilation.
Fasteners & Sealants High-grade galvanized fasteners and weather-proof silicon sealants.

Sheeting Profiles

1100 Profile (Hi-Cover) Ribbed steel for roof & wall.
Specs: 0.47-0.8mm High Tensile Steel (340/550 MPA). Galvalume AZ150.
4Feet Profile (Ultrashine) Multi-layer coated profile for enhanced durability and aesthetics. ideal for wide coverage requirements.
1100 Profile (Hi-Strength) Optimized load-bearing profile for heavy-duty applications. Width: 1100mm total (1030mm cover).

Standard Frame Types

Tapered Column Clear Span (TCCS)
Multi Gable (MG) l-ll
Multi Span l
Multi Span ll
Multi Span lll
Clear Span With Crane
Multi Span (l) With Crane & Mezzanine
Mono Slope
Lean - To
Rafter System
Mezzanine Systems
Jack Beam At Interior Column Location
Jack Beam At Sidewall

Fascia & Gutter Systems

Flush Fascias With Eave Gutter
Flushed Fascia Or Parapet Fascia
Vertical Fascia With Valley Gutter
Bottom Curved Fascia With Velly Gutter

Mezzanine Systems

Advanced Mezzanine Systems Optimize vertical space with our rigid frame columns for multi-level storage and operations.
Jack Beam Technology Create wide column-free spaces with Jack Beams at sidewalls or interior columns.

Sectors We Serve

Industrial Sheds & Manufacturing Units

Warehouses & Logistics Parks

Commercial Complexes & Showrooms

Institutional Buildings & Schools

Agricultural Buildings & Storage Yards

Automobile Workshop & Service Center

Poultry Sheds & Dairy Farms

Exhibition Halls & Recreational Facilities
